roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE/NP/X:NEGATIVE ACM COMPLIANCE REPORT RECEIVED, COURT INVOKES DEFENDANT'S TWO HOUR TELEPHONE STANDBY,/TEXT:TRANSTO DEPT 17/TRANS 17:FORTHWITH AT 1:30 P,M, FOR STATUS REGARDING ACM COMPLIANCE/DOPC/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED,/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 2, PC 602,5(B), A MISDEMEANOR,/X:COURT GRANTS THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS COUNT 1 PURSUANT TO PC 1385 IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/IRRC/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHTTO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:03-23-20/BAIL:15,000/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/S17/CONTD O2-24-20, TO SET JURYTRIAL/DOP/CONTD 02-28-20, ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIG RPT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:VOLUNTEER ATTORNEY, OLIVIA TAYLOR, IS PRESENT AND IS REPRESENTING THE DEFENDANT FOR THE PUBLIC DEFENDER/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:02-21-2020/987,2/BAIL:100,000/X:COURT SETS BAIL WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SA1:KATHERINE RICE/SA2:126 LINDA ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PTC AND TO SET TRIAL/DAWT/LDTR:03-23-20/X:JURY TRIAL ON 03-13-20 ISCONFIRMED/CONTD:D21 FOR A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE/SB:2HR/
/CAL: TO SET JURY TRIAL/ACM/CTORD: DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO ACM TWO TIMES PER WEEK IN PERSON/LD: 03-23-20/CONTD: PRETRIAL AND TO SET TRIAL/DOP/
